Class DashboardApi

java.lang.Object
com.sait.workshop05.api.DashboardApi
public final class DashboardApi extends Object
Dashboard summary from GET /api/v1/admin/dashboard/summary. On non-success status builds totals from orders customers and products calls instead.

    Method
    Description
    static DashboardApi.SummaryResponse
    fetchSummary()
    Loads dashboard summary metrics and falls back to local aggregation on failure.
    static List<OrderItem>
    itemsFromSummaryOrder(OrderApi.OrderJson j)
    Maps embedded dashboard line items into OrderItem rows.
    static Order
    toOrder(OrderApi.OrderJson j)
    Maps one dashboard order payload into the shared Order model.
